nasb.text: All the pillars around the court shall be furnished with silver bands with their hooks of silver and their sockets of bronze.

esv.text: All the pillars around the court shall be filleted with silver. Their hooks shall be of silver, and their bases of bronze.

cnv.text: 院子周圍一切柱子，都要用銀桁子相連起來。柱子上的鉤子是銀的，插座是銅的。

ccb.text: 所有绕着院子的柱子都要用银制的横杆连接，所有的钩子都要用银制作，带凹槽的底座要用铜制作。
